arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea are 'likely' to let £12m man leave in January despite 'proud' comments that Blues fans loved
arts.sum: They're not trying to sell him.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target Randal Kolo Muani as race for striker heats up
arts.sum: According to a report from Foot Mercato, Chelsea FC are considering a move for Randal Kolo Muani (26) in the upcoming transfer window. The French outlet writes that the London…

arts.ttl: Southampton, Ipswich Town to fight three Championship clubs for 64-cap international star in January?
arts.sum: Southampton and Ipswich are reportedly keen on the January signing of former Leeds United midfielder Glen Kamara, who is currently out of favour at French side Rennes.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make FIVE players available for January transfers including Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea are hoping to offload five players in the January transfer window, with manager Enzo Maresca keen to trim his squad down further following a summer of change

arts.ttl: Arsenal eyeing €25-30m-rated prodigy on Liverpool and Chelsea radar
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with a move for the LOSC Lille midfielder Ayyoub Bouaddi. The 17-year-old French prodigy has attracted the attention of the Premier League club with his performances in Ligue 1 this season. He has been an important first-team player for the French outfit and the likes of Liverpool and Chelsea are keeping […] The post Arsenal eyeing €25-30m-rated prodigy on Liverpool and Chelsea radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'We want to be first' - Arteta wants more after win over Ipswich
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta praises his side for where they are in the Premier League given injuries and red cards throughout the season, but says they are "not where we want" to be.

arts.ttl: McKenna proud of Ipswich 'resilience' despite defeat
arts.sum: Ipswich manager Kieran McKenna praises his side's "resilience" in their 1-0 Premier League defeat to Arsenal at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: What Chelsea's former head of youth recruitment said about Omari Hutchinson as £20m Ipswich man now prepares to face the Blues
arts.sum: He was delighted with his arrival.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Mourinho plots January raid with Blues star among top targets
arts.sum: Chief among those is Spurs superstar and captain Heung-min Son as well as Roma's Nicola Zalewski . Heung-min Son is, of course, a true hero at Spurs with 169 goals and 90 assists in 429 appearances for the North London club.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans will be hoping for better result vs Ipswich than their last Premier League clash 22 years ago, Zola and Lampard couldn’t score
arts.sum: They can't have a repeat of that result.
